title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Jaypore

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Jaypore
jsonLd.description:
Jaypore invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jaypore:
Jaypore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
